# Backlink Validation Rubric

## Verdicts

| Verdict | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `approve` | Relevant, useful, permitted, low risk. |
| `revise` | Potentially useful but needs anchor/context/disclosure/rule fixes. |
| `reject` | Spam, toxic, irrelevant, deceptive, or forbidden. |
| `needs_more_evidence` | Missing source URL, rule check, link attributes, or context. |

## Required Evidence

- source URL;
- target URL;
- anchor text;
- page context;
- link attribute;
- platform-rule status;
- approval status.

## High-Risk Signals

- unrelated domain or page;
- link farm/PBN footprint;
- mass outbound links;
- exact-match anchor stuffing;
- fake review;
- hidden link;
- paid link without disclosure;
- copied AI content with no editorial value.
